TopModule.BindInstances: icmp_ln151_fu_234_p2 add_ln151_fu_240_p2 add_ln153_fu_255_p2 control_s_axi_U control_r_s_axi_U gmem_x_test_m_axi_U gmem_x_train_m_axi_U gmem_y_test_m_axi_U gmem_y_train_m_axi_U

field.name: Enable
field.description: Master enable for the device interrupt output to the system interrupt controller: 0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled

field.name: CHAN0_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 0 (ap_done) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 0 interrupt, 1 = Channel 0 interrupt.

field.name: CHAN1_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 1 (ap_ready) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 1 interrupt, 1 = Channel 1 interrupt.

table.keys: Interface, Read/Write, Data Width (SW->HW), Address Width, Latency, Offset, Register, Max Widen Bitwidth, Max Read Burst Length, Max Write Burst Length, Num Read Outstanding, Num Write Outstanding, Resource Estimate
Interface, Data Width, Address Width, Offset, Register
Interface, Register, Offset, Width, Access, Description, Bit Fields
table.column: GIER, 0x04, 32, RW, Global Interrupt Enable Register, 0=Enable
IP_IER, 0x08, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Enable Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_EN 1=CHAN1_INT_EN
IP_ISR, 0x0c, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Status Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_ST 1=CHAN1_INT_ST
X_test_1, 0x10, 32, W, Data signal of X_test,
X_test_2, 0x14, 32, W, Data signal of X_test,
X_train_1, 0x1c, 32, W, Data signal of X_train,
X_train_2, 0x20, 32, W, Data signal of X_train,
y_train_1, 0x28, 32, W, Data signal of y_train,
y_train_2, 0x2c, 32, W, Data signal of y_train,
y_test_1, 0x34, 32, W, Data signal of y_test,
y_test_2, 0x38, 32, W, Data signal of y_test,

table.keys: Argument, HW Interface, HW Type, HW Usage, HW Info
table.column: s_axi_control_r, register, offset, name=X_test_1 offset=0x10 range=32
s_axi_control_r, register, offset, name=X_test_2 offset=0x14 range=32
s_axi_control_r, register, offset, name=X_train_1 offset=0x1c range=32
s_axi_control_r, register, offset, name=X_train_2 offset=0x20 range=32
s_axi_control_r, register, offset, name=y_train_1 offset=0x28 range=32
s_axi_control_r, register, offset, name=y_train_2 offset=0x2c range=32
s_axi_control_r, register, offset, name=y_test_1 offset=0x34 range=32
s_axi_control_r, register, offset, name=y_test_2 offset=0x38 range=32

section.name: M_AXI Burst Information
section.HEADER_NOTE: Note: All burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

table.keys: HW Interface, Direction, Length, Width, Loop, Loop Location
HW Interface, Variable, Access Location, Direction, Burst Status, Length, Loop, Loop Location, Resolution, Problem
table.column: test_point, ../src/knn.cpp:51:28, read, Widen Fail, , feature_loop, ../src/knn.cpp:50:23, 214-353, Could not widen since type double size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0
test_point, ../src/knn.cpp:51:28, read, Fail, , train_loop, ../src/knn.cpp:40:17, 214-229, Could not analyze pattern

X_train, ../src/knn.cpp:51:44, read, Widen Fail, , feature_loop, ../src/knn.cpp:50:23, 214-353, Could not widen since type double size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0
